description: Large cloth paintings depicting Lord Krishna, traditionally used as temple backdrops
historicalBackground: Created as temple art, these paintings serve as focal points for worship and devotion

paintings.title: Krishna Butter Theft
paintings.description: Playful depiction of young Krishna stealing butter in Gokul

paintings.title: Krishna Flute Concert
paintings.description: Enchanting scene of Krishna playing flute with devotees

paintings.title: Govardhan Mountain Lifting
paintings.description: Epic scene of Krishna lifting Govardhan mountain
